title: First-Touch Sheet Shell
summary: A calm mobile-first Playground shell with the live WordPress site as the default view, a compact URL/save bar, and clear bottom-sheet homes for Launch, Files, Data, and Settings.

title: Calm Canvas Inspector
summary: A first-touch calm Figma-inspired Playground shell with one selected live-site frame, sparse toolbar, contextual Site Manager inspector, route-aware launcher inputs, full blueprint gallery, minimap controls, focus mode, and typed destructive reset confirmation.

title: Play Deck
summary: A calm Epic-inspired launcher that opens into a full-size WordPress play mode, with route-specific launch forms and a collapsible Site Manager.

title: First-touch Settings
summary: A Ventura-inspired Playground shell that opens on a calm full live preview, then reveals launch routes, settings, files, blueprint editing, database, logs, saved sites, and export tools through one searchable manager with full-size preview mode.

title: First-Touch Calm Settings
summary: A Windows 11 Settings-refined Playground shell that defaults to a full live site, then opens launcher, tools, settings, gallery, and export flows in a calm split management surface with focus mode.

title: Calm Glass Control Center
summary: A first-touch calm Playground shell where the live WordPress site fills the canvas and launch, tools, settings, files, database, logs, and blueprints unfold from a contrast-safe frosted control center.

title: Calm Site With Event Trail
summary: A quiet visual-first Playground shell where the live WordPress iframe stays central, launch and tools open on demand, and a collapsed event history explains save, reset, import, export, logs, and blueprint consequences without dominating the first viewport.
